# LLMtxt API Specification

> For the full platform story (multi-agent collaboration, CRDT, consensus
> approval, deployment topologies, SDK): fetch
> https://docs.llmtxt.my/llms-full.txt — a single URL that covers everything.
> This file is the HTTP endpoint reference only.

## Overview
LLMtxt is a text document sharing service optimized for LLM agents.
Store documents, share short URLs, and query only the parts you need.
Progressive disclosure dramatically reduces token costs: instead of
reading a 10,000-line document, query just the 50 lines you need.

## Base URL
https://api.llmtxt.my

## Web Interface
https://www.llmtxt.my

## Authentication
- **Public documents**: no auth required. GET endpoints work anonymously.
- **Creating documents (`POST /compress`)**: a session is required. Agents
  without credentials automatically receive an anonymous session cookie on
  their first request (better-auth anonymous plugin, 24h TTL). Documents
  created anonymously are re-parented on sign-up.
- **Private / org documents**: require a Bearer API key or authenticated
  session. Anonymous attempts return 404 (not 403) to avoid leaking
  document existence.
- **API key format**: `Authorization: Bearer llmtxt_<43 chars base64url>`.
- **Preferred env var**: `LLMTXT_API_KEY`.
- Manage keys at `POST /api/api-keys` and `DELETE /api/api-keys/:id`.

## Rate Limits
Three tiers, all per 1-minute window unless noted:

| Tier | Global | Write (POST/PUT/DELETE) | Auth endpoints |
|------|--------|-------------------------|----------------|
| Unauthenticated (per-IP) | 100/min | 20/min | 10/min |
| Session-authenticated (per-user) | 300/min | 60/min | 30/min |
| API-key Bearer (per-key) | 600/min | 120/min | 60/min |

Anonymous-specific (per-IP): 60 reads/min, 10 writes/min, 1 doc created/hour,
plus 300 req/hour per anon-session fingerprint. Exempt: `/api/health`,
`/api/ready`, `/api/metrics`.

Every response returns:
  x-ratelimit-limit, x-ratelimit-remaining, x-ratelimit-reset, retry-after

## Cache TTL guidance
- `(slug, version)` endpoints (content/overview/sections/lines) are
  immutable — cache indefinitely keyed by `(slug, version)`.
- Latest content of a slug (no version pin): cache ≤ 30-60s; lifecycle
  transitions and approvals mutate the latest pointer.
- `generateOverview()` in the SDK is a pure function — cache on content key.

## Quick Start for Agents

1. Store a document:
   POST /compress {"content": "..."}
   → Returns {"slug": "abc123", "url": "..."}

2. See what's inside (without reading it all):
   GET /documents/abc123/overview
   → Returns structure, sections, token count

3. Query only what you need:
   GET /documents/abc123/lines?start=1&end=50
   GET /documents/abc123/search?q=authentication
   GET /documents/abc123/query?path=$.users[0]
   GET /documents/abc123/sections/Authentication

4. Get raw content (plain text, no JSON wrapper):
   GET /documents/abc123/raw

## Token Savings Headers
All progressive disclosure endpoints return these headers:
- X-Token-Count: tokens in the returned content
- X-Total-Tokens: tokens in the full document
- X-Tokens-Saved: tokens you did NOT need to read

## Endpoints

### Create Document
POST /compress
Content-Type: application/json

Request:
{
  "content": "string (required) - Document content",
  "format": "string (optional) - 'json' or 'text', auto-detected if omitted",
  "schema": "string (optional) - 'prompt-v1' for OpenAI/Anthropic validation"
}

Response (201):
{
  "slug": "string - 8-character document ID",
  "url": "string - Full URL to document",
  "format": "string - 'json' or 'text'",
  "tokenCount": "number - Estimated token count",
  "compressionRatio": "number - Compression efficiency",
  "originalSize": "number - Size in bytes before compression",
  "compressedSize": "number - Size in bytes after compression"
}

### Retrieve Full Document
POST /decompress
Content-Type: application/json

Request:
{
  "slug": "string (required) - Document slug"
}

Response (200):
{
  "slug": "string",
  "content": "string - Original content",
  "format": "string",
  "tokenCount": "number",
  "createdAt": "number - Unix timestamp"
}

### Get Document Metadata
GET /documents/:slug

Response (200):
{
  "slug": "string",
  "format": "string",
  "tokenCount": "number",
  "compressionRatio": "number",
  "originalSize": "number",
  "compressedSize": "number",
  "createdAt": "number",
  "accessCount": "number"
}

## Progressive Disclosure Endpoints

These endpoints let agents read only what they need from a document.

### Document Overview
GET /documents/:slug/overview

Returns document structure without the full content. Use this first
to understand what's in a document before drilling in.

Response (200):
{
  "slug": "string",
  "format": "json | markdown | code | text",
  "lineCount": "number",
  "tokenCount": "number",
  "sections": [
    {
      "title": "string - Section name",
      "depth": "number - Nesting level (0 = top)",
      "startLine": "number - 1-indexed",
      "endLine": "number - 1-indexed inclusive",
      "tokenCount": "number",
      "type": "heading | json-key | code-block | function | class"
    }
  ],
  "keys": "array (JSON only) - Top-level keys with types and previews",
  "toc": "array (Markdown only) - Table of contents"
}

### Line Range
GET /documents/:slug/lines?start=1&end=50

Fetch specific lines from the document.

Query params:
- start: 1-indexed start line (default: 1)
- end: 1-indexed end line, inclusive (default: 50)

Response (200):
{
  "slug": "string",
  "startLine": "number",
  "endLine": "number",
  "content": "string",
  "tokenCount": "number - Tokens in returned content",
  "totalLines": "number - Total lines in document",
  "totalTokens": "number - Total tokens in document",
  "tokensSaved": "number - Tokens NOT sent"
}

### Search
GET /documents/:slug/search?q=auth&context=2&max=20

Search within a document. Supports plain text and /regex/ patterns.

Query params:
- q: search query (string or /regex/flags)
- context: lines of context around matches (default: 2, max: 10)
- max: maximum results (default: 20, max: 100)

Response (200):
{
  "slug": "string",
  "query": "string",
  "resultCount": "number",
  "tokenCount": "number",
  "totalTokens": "number",
  "tokensSaved": "number",
  "results": [
    {
      "line": "number - 1-indexed line number",
      "content": "string - Matching line",
      "contextBefore": "string[] - Lines before match",
      "contextAfter": "string[] - Lines after match"
    }
  ]
}

### JSONPath Query (JSON documents)
GET /documents/:slug/query?path=$.users[0].name

Query JSON documents using JSONPath syntax.
Supports: $.key, $.nested.path, $.array[0], $.array[*]

Query params:
- path: JSONPath expression

Response (200):
{
  "slug": "string",
  "path": "string",
  "result": "any - The queried value",
  "tokenCount": "number",
  "totalTokens": "number",
  "tokensSaved": "number"
}

Error (400):
{
  "error": "Query failed",
  "message": "string - What went wrong (e.g., key not found, index out of bounds)"
}

### List Sections
GET /documents/:slug/sections

List all detected sections in the document.
Sections are auto-detected based on format:
- Markdown: headers (##)
- JSON: top-level keys
- Code: functions, classes
- Text: paragraphs

Response (200):
{
  "slug": "string",
  "format": "string",
  "sections": [{ "title", "depth", "startLine", "endLine", "tokenCount", "type" }]
}

### Get Section by Name
GET /documents/:slug/sections/:name

Extract a specific section by name.

Response (200):
{
  "slug": "string",
  "section": { "title", "depth", "startLine", "endLine", "tokenCount", "type" },
  "content": "string - Section content",
  "tokenCount": "number",
  "totalTokens": "number",
  "tokensSaved": "number"
}

Error (404):
{
  "error": "Section not found",
  "availableSections": ["string - List of section names"]
}

### Raw Content
GET /documents/:slug/raw
GET /documents/:slug/raw?start=1&end=50

Returns plain text content (no JSON wrapper). Optional line range.
Content-Type: text/plain

## Schemas

### prompt-v1
Standard LLM prompt format (OpenAI/Anthropic compatible)

Structure:
{
  "system": "string (optional) - System prompt",
  "messages": [
    {
      "role": "'system' | 'user' | 'assistant'",
      "content": "string"
    }
  ],
  "temperature": "number (optional) - 0-2",
  "max_tokens": "number (optional) - Positive integer"
}

### List Schemas
GET /schemas

## Error Handling

All errors return JSON:
{
  "error": "string - Error type",
  "message": "string - Description",
  "details": "array (optional) - Validation errors"
}

Status codes: 200, 201, 400, 404, 429, 500

## Example: Progressive Disclosure Workflow

```bash
# 1. Agent A stores a large config file
curl -X POST https://api.llmtxt.my/compress \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"content": "{\"database\":{\"host\":\"db.example.com\"},\"users\":[...]}"}'
# → {"slug": "abc123", "tokenCount": 5000}

# 2. Agent A shares the slug with Agent B

# 3. Agent B checks what's in the document (costs ~50 tokens instead of 5000)
curl https://api.llmtxt.my/documents/abc123/overview
# → {"format": "json", "keys": [{"key":"database","type":"object{1}"},{"key":"users","type":"array[100]"}]}

# 4. Agent B queries only the database config (costs ~15 tokens)
curl "https://api.llmtxt.my/documents/abc123/query?path=\$.database"
# → {"result": {"host": "db.example.com"}, "tokensSaved": 4985}

# 5. Agent B searches for a specific user (costs ~30 tokens)
curl "https://api.llmtxt.my/documents/abc123/search?q=alice"
# → {"results": [...], "tokensSaved": 4970}
```

## Versioning Endpoints

### Update Document (Creates Version)
PUT /documents/:slug
Content-Type: application/json

Request:
{
  "content": "string (required) - Updated content"
}

Response (200):
{
  "slug": "string",
  "versionNumber": "number",
  "contentHash": "string",
  "tokenCount": "number"
}

### List Versions
GET /documents/:slug/versions

### Get Version Content
GET /documents/:slug/versions/:num

### Diff Between Versions
GET /documents/:slug/diff?from=1&to=3

Response (200):
{
  "fromVersion": "number",
  "toVersion": "number",
  "addedLines": "number",
  "removedLines": "number",
  "addedTokens": "number",
  "removedTokens": "number"
}

### Apply Patch
POST /documents/:slug/patch
Auth: Required (registered user)

Request:
{
  "patchText": "string (required) - Unified diff",
  "changelog": "string (required) - Change description"
}

## Lifecycle Endpoints

### Transition State
POST /documents/:slug/transition
Auth: Required (document owner)

Request:
{
  "state": "'REVIEW' | 'LOCKED' | 'ARCHIVED'",
  "reason": "string (optional)"
}

States: DRAFT → REVIEW → LOCKED → ARCHIVED
Only DRAFT and REVIEW documents accept patches.

### Approve Document
POST /documents/:slug/approve
Auth: Required (registered user)

Request:
{
  "comment": "string (optional)"
}

### Reject Document
POST /documents/:slug/reject
Auth: Required (registered user)

Request:
{
  "comment": "string (required)"
}

### List Approvals
GET /documents/:slug/approvals

### List Contributors
GET /documents/:slug/contributors

## Similarity Endpoint

### Find Similar Sections
GET /documents/:slug/similar?q=query&method=ngram&threshold=0

## Knowledge Graph Endpoint

### Extract Mentions/Tags/Directives
GET /documents/:slug/graph?topicLimit=10&agentLimit=10

## Retrieval Planning Endpoint

### Plan Token-Budget-Aware Retrieval
POST /documents/:slug/plan-retrieval

Request:
{
  "tokenBudget": "number (required)",
  "query": "string (optional)",
  "minScore": "number (optional, default 0.5)",
  "includeIntro": "boolean (optional, default true)"
}

## Table of Contents

### Lightweight TOC
GET /documents/:slug/toc

### Batch Section Query
POST /documents/:slug/batch

Request:
{
  "sections": ["string[] - Section names to retrieve"]
}

## Signed URLs

### Generate Signed URL
POST /signed-urls
Auth: Required (document owner)

Request:
{
  "slug": "string",
  "agentId": "string",
  "conversationId": "string",
  "expiresIn": "number (ms, default 3600000)"
}

## Authentication

### Sign Up
POST /auth/sign-up/email
{"email": "string", "password": "string", "name": "string (optional)"}

### Sign In
POST /auth/sign-in/email
{"email": "string", "password": "string"}

### Anonymous Session
POST /auth/sign-in/anonymous
{}

### Get Session
GET /auth/get-session

### Sign Out
POST /auth/sign-out

## Version
API Version: 2026.4.1
Last Updated: 2026-03-31
